name: Email Digest
description: Categorized summary of unread Outlook emails — action items, team, leadership, builds.
prompt: 📧 Give me a categorized digest of my unread Outlook emails. Read unread mail via Outlook COM (Outlook is running; use a Restrict filter of [UnRead]=True). Group into: Action Items (I'm explicitly asked to do something), Team, Leadership, Builds/Pipelines, and Other. For each item show sender, subject, a 1-line summary, and any link. Sort by importance and keep it concise.

name: Teams Summary
description: Summarize recent Teams messages from the local client cache (no Graph token needed).
prompt: 💬 Summarize my recent Microsoft Teams messages by reading the local Teams WebView2 IndexedDB cache directly (Graph API is blocked by the tenant token-protection policy, so do NOT use a token). Show: recent messages (timestamp, sender, snippet), people mentioned, chat/channel subjects, and shared links (ADO PRs, builds, work items). Group and dedupe, and flag anything that looks like it needs my reply.
